channels.label: Mizoram Police - official citizen portal
channels.source_name: Mizoram Police, Government of Mizoram
channels.note: Actively maintained (sub-pages updated as recently as 1 Jun 2026). Carries helplines, station contact list, View FIR, ILP and cyber-crime links. NOTE: the 'CCTNS Citizen Portal' link on this site (cctns.mizoram.gov.in) is dead - the host does not resolve - so it is deliberately not cited here.

channels.label: Mizoram Police - contact numbers of all police stations and outposts
channels.source_name: Mizoram Police - Contact Numbers of Police Stations and Outposts
channels.note: District-by-district PS/OP numbers for all 11 districts. Page updated 1 Jun 2026 - the most current contact source found for Mizoram. Mizoram does not publish a single statewide police control-room number; ERSS 112 serves that role.

channels.label: All Women Police Station, Mizoram
channels.source_name: Mizoram Police - Contact Numbers of Police Stations and Outposts
channels.note: State-specific. Listed under 'Special Police Stations'. Verified from the raw HTML table. Page updated 1 Jun 2026.

channels.label: Cyber Crime Police Station, Mizoram
channels.source_name: Mizoram Police - Contact Numbers of Police Stations and Outposts
channels.note: State-specific. Listed under 'Special Police Stations'. Verified from the raw HTML table. Page updated 1 Jun 2026.

channels.label: Mipui Aw - Mizoram online public grievance portal (PGRAMS)
channels.source_name: Mipui Aw (PGRAMS), Government of Mizoram
channels.note: Mizoram's official citizen grievance redressal platform. Citizens lodge complaints against any department; each department has role-based access; status is tracked by a unique registration ID; an appeal facility opens if the complainant rates the resolution 'Poor'. The portal explicitly warns: grievances sent by email are NOT entertained - they must be lodged on the website. Verified live with active counters (672 grievances registered, 611 closed at time of check). This is the answer to 'state online grievance portal'.

channels.label: Chief Minister's Office, Mizoram (Aizawl)
channels.source_name: Chief Minister Online, Government of Mizoram - Contact Us
channels.note: Mizoram publishes NO dedicated 'CM Helpline' short code or 1800 number - I searched the state portal, CM portal and grievance portal and none exists. Citizen grievances go through the Mipui Aw web portal instead. This is the CM Office's published landline, not a helpline. Other CMO lines on the same page: 0389-2342163, 0389-2322517, 0389-2346134. Email: cm@mizoram.gov.in. Address: McDonald Hill, Zarkawt, Aizawl 796001. Page updated 16 Dec 2025.

channels.label: Chief Minister Online - Mizoram CMO portal
channels.source_name: Chief Minister Online, Government of Mizoram
channels.note: Official portal for the Chief Minister of Mizoram (Lalduhoma), developed by the Dept of Information & Communication Technology, Govt of Mizoram.

channels.label: Mizoram State Portal - official homepage
channels.source_name: Mizoram Portal, Government of Mizoram
channels.note: Official state portal, developed and hosted by the Dept of Information & Communication Technology, Govt of Mizoram. Note: the legacy mizoram.nic.in domain is DEAD (does not resolve) - do not link it. The portal is a JS single-page app; content loads from /api/page/<slug>.

channels.label: Mizoram Web Directory - official listing of all Govt of Mizoram websites, incl. every district Deputy Commissioner's office
channels.source_name: Mizoram Portal - Web Directory
channels.note: DISTRICT DIRECTORY ANSWER: Mizoram's state portal has no page titled 'Districts'. This Web Directory is the official page that links each district's own site - verified 362 live hyperlinks including dcaizawl, dcchamphai, dchnahthial, dckhawzawl, dckolasib, dclawngtlai, dclunglei, dcmamit, dcsaiha, dcsaitual, dcserchhip (.mizoram.gov.in) plus the district CMO sites. Page header states 'As on February 2025'; record updated 2 Aug 2025.

channels.label: Mizoram State Emergency Operations Centre (SEOC) - direct line
channels.source_name: Department of Disaster Management & Rehabilitation, Government of Mizoram - Emergency Operation Centres
channels.note: State-specific direct number for the State EOC at Chawnpui, Aizawl, published alongside the 1070 short code. Page updated 31 Jul 2024.

channels.label: Power & Electricity Department, Mizoram - power cut complaint/enquiry
channels.source_name: Power & Electricity Department, Government of Mizoram - Contact Us
channels.note: STALENESS WARNING - USE WITH CAUTION: published verbatim as 'Power cut Complaint/enquire : 0389 2321650 / 2322174 / 2310169' at the Engineer-in-Chief's office, Kawlphetha Building, New Secretariat Complex, Khatla, Aizawl 796001. However this official page shows 'Page Created On: 6th Feb 18 / Updated On: 13th Mar 18' - it has not been touched in 8 years, so the number may be outdated. Alternates: 0389-2322174, 0389-2310169. Mizoram has no separate DISCOM - power is run directly by the state department. Consider showing the last-updated date to users or verifying before display.

channels.label: Power & Electricity Department, Mizoram - official site
channels.source_name: Power & Electricity Department, Government of Mizoram
channels.note: Official department site (Mizoram has no separate DISCOM company). Its homepage links an 'Online consumer complaint' portal at https://pedmconsumer.ugoerp.com/ and a 'Consumer Grievance Redressal Forum and Electricity Ombudsman Regulations 2025 & complaint Form' page at https://power.mizoram.gov.in/page/consumer-grievance-redressal-forum-and-electricity-ombudsman-regulations-2025-complaint-form. I did not cite the ugoerp.com portal as a primary channel because it sits on a private vendor domain rather than a .gov.in one, though it is officially linked and returns HTTP 200.

channels.label: National Emergency Number (ERSS) - Police, Fire & Rescue, Health
channels.source_name: Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India
channels.note: MHA's single pan-India emergency number: 'ONE INDIA ONE EMERGENCY NUMBER 112', a nationwide unified emergency response system. Works in every State/UT. Corroborated by india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 112 as the Integrated Helpline (ERSS) covering Police, Fire & Rescue and Health services.

channels.label: Fire Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed under 'Emergency Numbers' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: National Ambulance Service (NAS)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Ambulance Service (NAS)' under Emergency Numbers on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Women Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Women Helpline Toll free No. - 181' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed on india.gov.in as both 'Women Helpline Number' and 'Domestic Violence Helpline'.

channels.label: National Commission for Women (NCW) 24x7 Helpline
channels.source_name: National Commission for Women (NCW)
channels.note: NCW's own site states: 'Call the 24x7 NCW helpline at 14490 for immediate assistance and support', and lists 'NCW Women Helpline (14490)' under its Complaint Redressal cells. IMPORTANT: the india.gov.in helpline directory still lists 7827170170 as the 'National Commission for Women Helpline' - that number appears nowhere on ncw.gov.in (not even in raw HTML), so it appears stale and was deliberately omitted in favour of the department's own current number.

channels.label: Child Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Child Helpline Toll free No. - 1098' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed as 'Child Help Line' on india.gov.in.

channels.label: Elderline - National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)
channels.source_name: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Elder Helpline: 14567' on the Department of Social Justice & Empowerment's own Elderline site, which the ministry homepage links to as the 'National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)'. india.gov.in additionally lists a landline 011-20893999 alongside 14567 for the Senior Citizens Helpline.

channels.label: National Consumer Helpline (NCH)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Consumer Helpline (NCH)' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026). Note: the NCH portal consumerhelpline.gov.in could not be reached at time of research (DNS resolves to an NIC address but the host refused connections / returned 504), so only the number is cited here - not the NCH portal URL.

channels.label: Cyber Crime Helpline (online financial fraud reporting)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Confirmed on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal homepage banner (MHA / Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre - I4C), which reads: 'To report online financial fraud, call 1930' and 'register your complaint at cybercrime.gov.in'. Independently corroborated by the india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 1930 as the Cyber Crime Helpline.

channels.label: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal (file a cybercrime complaint)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Verified live. Ministry of Home Affairs portal for reporting cybercrime; supports anonymous reporting, women/children-related crime, financial fraud and other cybercrime, plus complaint tracking. Nationwide.

channels.label: CPGRAMS - Centralised Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System
channels.source_name: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions, Government of India
channels.note: Verified live; this is the citizen-facing portal. The site states CPGRAMS is 'an online platform available to the citizens 24x7 to lodge their grievances to the public authorities on any subject related to service delivery... a single portal connected to all the Ministries/Departments of Government of India and States.' Supports tracking by registration ID and an appeal facility. Note: it does not cover RTI matters, subjudice/court matters, or religious matters.

channels.label: Central Vigilance Commission - lodge a corruption complaint
channels.source_name: Central Vigilance Commission (CVC), Government of India
channels.note: Verified live. CVC's Complaint Management System with a 'Citizen Login', complaint status tracking and a published complaint handling policy. Linked from cvc.gov.in as 'Lodge a complaint'. Covers corruption complaints against central government organisations.

channels.label: Relief Commissioner for Natural Calamities
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Road Accident Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).
